details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory is missing. All other expected top-level directories (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) and reports/audit/ are present.
governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ directory is missing. memory_bank/ has key docs (6 files), .cursor/automations/ exists with README + specs, reports/audit/ exists.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory exists at repo root with active Python code (board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py, __init__.py, agents/). Additionally, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py and scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py reference moltbot patterns. These are code/config files, not reports/audit or docs documenting removal.
